Perfect for Gift - These glass mugs are excellent gift for any occasion to parents, couples and friends. The perfect gift for Charismas, Birthday, Wedding Anniversary and Valentine’s Day.
Best Usage - These iced latte glass are a classy way to serve your drinks. Coffee cup are perfect for Latte, Cappuccino, Hot Chocolate, Milk, Tea, Espresso, and any other hot or cold drinks.
Dishwasher Safe - Each piece of latte mugs can be easily cleaned in the dishwasher. Featuring a durable design these classy clear hot chocolate glass mug can be used for home restaurants and cafes.
